LINE 6: WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
                                  ^"

args.query:
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'^#','') AS AgentId, SUM(qli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REGEXP_REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(c.Id,'^#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REGEXP_REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(o.Id,'^#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REGEXP_REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(q.Id,'^#','')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < TIMESTAMP '2022-11-26 00:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN Quote q ON REGEXP_REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(o.Id,'^#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REGEXP_REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(q.Id,'^#','')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < TIMESTAMP '2022-11-26 00:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'^#','') AS AgentId, SUM(qli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REGEXP_REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(c.Id,'^#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REGEXP_REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(o.Id,'^#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REGEXP_REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(q.Id,'^#','')
WHERE TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) < TIMESTAMP '2022-11-26 00:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'^#','') AS AgentId,
       SUM(TRY_CAST(qli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * TRY_CAST(qli.UnitPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REGEXP_REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(c.Id,'^#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REGEXP_REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(o.Id,'^#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REGEXP_REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(q.Id,'^#','')
WHERE TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) < TIMESTAMP '2022-11-26 00:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'^#','') AS AgentId,
       SUM(TRY_CAST(qli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * TRY_CAST(qli.UnitPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON REGEXP_REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(c.Id,'^#','')
JOIN Quote q ON REGEXP_REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(o.Id,'^#','')
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON REGEXP_REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'^#','') = REGEXP_REPLACE(q.Id,'^#','')
WHERE TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '2022-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND TRY_CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) < TIMESTAMP '2022-11-26 00:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
